Dear GitHub,

We are writing on behalf of Tencent Holdings Limited ("Tencent") to report copyright
infringement. The following repository hosts and distributes tools that reproduce and
extract proprietary WeChat chat-history data in violation of our rights:

* Infringing repository: https://github.com/wechat-archive/wechat-history-extract

We request that GitHub disable access to the infringing repository identified above.

Sincerely,
Counsel for Tencent Holdings Limited
